query: SELECT id, customerName, studentName, customerEmail, status, stripeCustomerId, stripeSubscriptionId, membershipPackageId, createdAt FROM enrollments WHERE customerName LIKE '%Bryce%' OR studentName LIKE '%Bryce%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
